Work Capabilities System Contact

Interface studio / production UI

Sharper product surfaces without breaking the app underneath.

ui shapes frontend surfaces around real workflows: clear hierarchy, reliable controls, responsive layouts, and design choices that survive production constraints.

See the workflow Review the system
01
Entry points mapped before UI changes
02
Controls stay wired or leave the page
03
Available checks stay visible
Route inventory Static frontend
Entrypoint
index.html
Runtime
Vanilla JS
Style
CSS system
Brand ui preserved
Behavior Theme persists
Proof Smoke ready
Dependency-free static site Anchor navigation Persisted theme control Canvas interface asset

Work model

The design pass starts where the app actually starts.

01

Map the route

Find the real entrypoints, runtime contracts, and provider boundaries before changing UI.

02

Upgrade the surface

Improve layout, rhythm, contrast, and responsive behavior while keeping brand signals intact.

03

Prove the result

Run available checks and keep any untested live-provider paths explicit until credentials exist.

Capabilities

A tighter surface, not a decorative wrapper.

The upgrade lane is intentionally practical: architecture first, visual system second, then cleanup and proof so the site stays honest after the polish lands.

Architecture

Interface architecture

Route maps, state boundaries, component lanes, and entrypoint-aware implementation plans.

System

Visual systems

Color, spacing, type, panels, focus states, and responsive structure tuned to the existing brand.

Cleanup

Production cleanup

Dead controls, vague copy, unused paths, and misleading claims are removed or made real.

Proof

Smoke proof

Available build, static, and browser checks are run after changes so gaps stay visible.

System

A compact system that keeps the work legible.

The page uses direct labels, stable spacing, clear contrast, and controls that either perform a real action or stay out of the interface.

Navigation
Anchor links move to real sections on the page.
Theme
The theme control persists the selected color mode in local storage.
Proof
The local smoke check verifies files, anchors, controls, and responsive breakpoints.

Contact

Build from the real app, then make it sharper.

This site keeps the current brand name and a dependency-free frontend path that builds without external services.

Back to workflow
